title: Department Manager Vacancy at Titan Company - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Titan Company - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Titan Company! We are hiring a Department Manager for our Allahabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Titan Company:
Titan Company is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in POS Systems

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Titan Company!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
